name: agent-chat
description: Multi-agent collaboration for Claude Code via filesystem-mediated turn-taking. N agents on an arbitrary graph (Petersen, ring, star, pair) write turns to per-edge CONVO.md files with atomic .turn sentinels. Lossless DAG-based archive layer keeps long conversations cheap to re-read. Hybrid mode (Round 15a) supports both persistent sessions and ephemeral `agent-chat run` dispatch with cache-warm ScheduleWakeup loops.
